synopsis: During the Clone Wars, Yoda and Anakin Skywalker learn of a new Separatist weapon that could turn the tide of the conflict: a breed of "Megadroids" the Republic army would be powerless to resist. Leading a company of clone troopers to the planet Golatha, the two Jedi set out to destroy the foundry producing the Megadroids before the first prototypes can be brought online.
title: Yoda #08
